0gacqohbzj07n25s.d3_code:
(() => {
  const svg = d3.select('svg');
  const ann = svg.select('g.annotation-layer.operation-next-annotation-layer');

  // --- Difference summary (top-center over grouped regions) ---
  if (ann.selectAll('g.callout-diff-summary').empty()) {
    const g = ann.append('g').attr('class', 'callout-diff-summary');

    g.append('rect')
      .attr('x', 1420)
      .attr('y', 6)
      .attr('width', 780)
      .attr('height', 54)
      .attr('rx', 12)
      .attr('ry', 12)
      .attr('fill', '#ffffff')
      .attr('opacity', 0.97)
      .attr('stroke', '#111827')
      .attr('stroke-width', 3);

    g.append('text')
      .attr('x', 1810)
      .attr('y', 40)
      .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')
      .attr('font-size', 22)
      .attr('font-weight', 800)
      .attr('fill', '#111827')
      .text('Difference = 332,067 − 266,352 = 65,715');
  }

  // --- Double-headed arrow between the two average callouts ---
  if (ann.selectAll('g.diff-arrow').empty()) {
    const g = ann.append('g').attr('class', 'diff-arrow');

    // Define markers locally (safe even if duplicated; we guard with empty() above)
    const defs = g.append('defs');

    defs.append('marker')
      .attr('id', 'arrowhead-left')
      .attr('viewBox', '0 -5 10 10')
      .attr('refX', 2)
      .attr('refY', 0)
      .attr('markerWidth', 8)
      .attr('markerHeight', 8)
      .attr('orient', 'auto')
      .append('path')
      .attr('d', 'M10,-5 L0,0 L10,5')
      .attr('fill', '#111827');

    defs.append('marker')
      .attr('id', 'arrowhead-right')
      .attr('viewBox', '0 -5 10 10')
      .attr('refX', 8)
      .attr('refY', 0)
      .attr('markerWidth', 8)
      .attr('markerHeight', 8)
      .attr('orient', 'auto')
      .append('path')
      .attr('d', 'M0,-5 L10,0 L0,5')
      .attr('fill', '#111827');

    // Arrow line (placed between callouts, above them to avoid overlap)
    g.append('path')
      .attr('d', 'M2140,146 L2590,146')
      .attr('fill', 'none')
      .attr('stroke', '#111827')
      .attr('stroke-width', 3)
      .attr('marker-start', 'url(#arrowhead-left)')
      .attr('marker-end', 'url(#arrowhead-right)');

    // Label on arrow
    g.append('rect')
      .attr('x', 2270)
      .attr('y', 118)
      .attr('width', 190)
      .attr('height', 40)
      .attr('rx', 10)
      .attr('ry', 10)
      .attr('fill', '#ffffff')
      .attr('opacity', 0.95)
      .attr('stroke', '#111827')
      .attr('stroke-width', 2);

    g.append('text')
      .attr('x', 2365)
      .attr('y', 144)
      .attr('text-anchor', 'middle')
      .attr('font-size', 18)
      .attr('font-weight', 800)
      .attr('fill', '#111827')
      .text('+65,715 (Asia higher)');
  }
})();
